Data Fields

class_file_t Struct Reference

#include <classfile.h>

Data Fields

union {
   FILE *   plain
 Plain file structure.
} file
 File handle.
bool jar
 True if the file is inside a JAR archive.

Detailed Description

Represents a class-file, this structure is used as a wrapper over the real class file so that the class-loader code can ignore if the class-file is a regular file or is embedded in a jar archive

Definition at line 138 of file classfile.h.
